ENDTEST

TEST s2_ring5L_f1_hamming
GAP_TYPE hamming
AGGREGATE min
ASB 0
DECODE 0
OVER_GROW_STEP 0
BITS_PER_STEP 1
NDET 5
NFAULT 5
NLOGICAL 1
CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
CTF 2 2 3
CTF 2 3 4
CTF 2 0 4
FTC 2 0 4
FTC 2 0 1
FTC 2 1 2
FTC 2 2 3
FTC 2 3 4
WEIGHTS 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196
L_ROW 1 0 0 0 0
SYNDROME 1 1 0 0 0
EXPECTED_GAP inf
EXPECTED_NONZERO 0
EXPECTED_FLIP 
ENDTEST

TEST s3_two_blocks_binary_min
GAP_TYPE binary
AGGREGATE min
ASB 0
DECODE 0
OVER_GROW_STEP 0
BITS_PER_STEP 1
NDET 8
NFAULT 8
NLOGICAL 2
CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
CTF 2 2 3
CTF 2 0 3
CTF 2 4 5
CTF 2 5 6
CTF 2 6 7
CTF 2 4 7
FTC 2 0 3
FTC 2 0 1
FTC 2 1 2
FTC 2 2 3
FTC 2 4 7
FTC 2 4 5
FTC 2 5 6
FTC 2 6 7
WEIGHTS 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196
L_ROW 1 0 0 0 0 0 0 0
L_ROW 0 0 0 0 1 0 0 0
SYNDROME 1 0 0 1 1 0 0 1
EXPECTED_GAP inf
EXPECTED_NONZERO 0
EXPECTED_FLIP 
ENDTEST

TEST s3_two_blocks_binary_sum
GAP_TYPE binary
AGGREGATE sum
ASB 0
DECODE 0
OVER_GROW_STEP 0
BITS_PER_STEP 1
NDET 8
NFAULT 8
NLOGICAL 2
CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
CTF 2 2 3
CTF 2 0 3
CTF 2 4 5
CTF 2 5 6
CTF 2 6 7
CTF 2 4 7
FTC 2 0 3
FTC 2 0 1
FTC 2 1 2
FTC 2 2 3
FTC 2 4 7
FTC 2 4 5
FTC 2 5 6
FTC 2 6 7
WEIGHTS 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196

L_ROW 0 0 0 0 1 0 0 0
SYNDROME 1 0 0 1 1 0 0 1
EXPECTED_GAP inf
EXPECTED_NONZERO 0
EXPECTED_FLIP 
ENDTEST

DECODE 0
OVER_GROW_STEP 0
BITS_PER_STEP 1
NDET 8
NFAULT 8

CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
CTF 2 2 3

FTC 2 2 3
FTC 2 4 7
FTC 2 4 5
FTC 2 5 6

EXPECTED_FLIP

AGGREGATE sum
ASB 0
DECODE 0

NDET 8

CTF 2 1 2

AGGREGATE min
ASB 0
DECODE 1
OVER_GROW_STEP 0
BITS_PER_STEP 1
NDET 8
NFAULT 8
NLOGICAL 2
CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
CTF 2 2 3
CTF 2 0 3
CTF 2 4 5
CTF 2 5 6
CTF 2 6 7
CTF 2 4 7
FTC 2 0 3
FTC 2 0 1
FTC 2 1 2
FTC 2 2 3
FTC 2 4 7
FTC 2 4 5
FTC 2 5 6
FTC 2 6 7

EXPECTED_GAP inf

EXPECTED_FLIP 1 1
ENDTEST

AGGREGATE sum
ASB 0

TEST s3_two_blocks_hamming_decode
GAP_TYPE hamming
AGGREGATE min
ASB 0
DECODE 1
OVER_GROW_STEP 0
BITS_PER_STEP 1
NDET 8
NFAULT 8
NLOGICAL 2
CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
CTF 2 2 3
CTF 2 0 3
CTF 2 4 5
CTF 2 5 6
CTF 2 6 7
CTF 2 4 7
FTC 2 0 3
FTC 2 0 1
FTC 2 1 2
FTC 2 2 3
FTC 2 4 7
FTC 2 4 5
FTC 2 5 6
FTC 2 6 7
WEIGHTS 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196 2.1972245773362196
L_ROW 1 0 0 0 0 0 0 0
L_ROW 0 0 0 0 1 0 0 0
SYNDROME 1 0 0 1 1 0 0 1
EXPECTED_GAP inf
EXPECTED_NONZERO 0
EXPECTED_FLIP 1 1
ENDTEST
